programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: Desert Bloom
programme.desc: Witness the silent resilience of the California desert. Experience the fleeting, brilliant beauty of the desert as it is momentarily reclaimed by a sea of wildflowers in this immersive, high-definition escape.

programme.title: Arches & Canyonlands
programme.desc: The sublime landscape of Arches and Canyonlands area of Utah is the star in this 90 minute film, which showcases awe-inspiring natural arches, dramatic canyon vista sunrises & sunsets, and flights through arches and over the Colorado River canyon. The spectacular cinematography is accompanied by beautiful Native American flute music. Note: All Drone footage was filmed outside of National and State Park boundaries.

programme.title: Preview of Canoeing Through Redwoods
programme.desc: 24/7 nature relaxation channel featuring cinematic scenes of the world’s most beautiful places. Perfect for stress relief, sleep, or peaceful background viewing.

programme.title: Magic of Zion
programme.desc: Experience the magnificent Zion National Park in its autumn splendor! Brilliant autumn colors combine with the warm red tones of Zion's dramatic cliffs to create a visual feast like no other in" Magic of Zion". Also included is rare footage of the endangered American Condor, the largest flying land bird in North America. Watch as a wild parent Condor feeds and nurtures its fledgling on the cliffs of Zion, an awe inspiring sight since there used to be only 50 condors in existence. Runtime 82 minutes.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.
